Generate a unique conversation ID (conv_id) using Python's uuid library.
recipe.generalized_functions:
import uuid

def generate_unique_conv_id():
    """Generate a unique conversation ID (conv_id) using the uuid4 method."""
    conv_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
    return conv_id
